text: I've got another codex working with PuppetMaster (my API key vision+Playwright wrapper to enable vision for Codex) and sweepweave-ts in the C projects folder to analyze and improve the pValue and p2Value conceptuality in the codex-skills folder for the storyworld-building skill and another skill related to small storyworlds for negotiation purposes in diplomacy relating to the AI-diplomacy folder in C:\ projects also, trying to make a brilliant breakthrough tonight for a paper to butress a grant proposal regarding forecasting. Your mission, is simply, to add a new folder to this GPTStoryworld repo called social-reasoning, ok and fucking go WILD building scripts and models, could be a new skill we'll see, for categorizing N agent logic that might manifest in these scripts in these storyworld encounter DAGs of defining how Party A's perception of Party B's perception of Party C's perception of loyalty or whatever variable would determine the result. In the context of Diplomacy this maps cleanly to game theory categories of coaliation, defection, betrayal, etc. and in the context of history we have things like common enemies, death-ground war scenarios changing game theoretic approach to risk and so on. Feel free to draw on the state of the art in papers about AI reasoning especially in multi agent simulation contexts, copy them into that folder, be sure to log this chat, you can read other Codex session chat histories in this repo and the AI diplomacy repo ("C:\projects\AI_Diplomacy") for reasoning dumps and learn from that, GoodStartLab's paper on their diplomacy work is a good reference, be a beast! But a noble beast insha'Allah
